national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Buyers of New York
buyers.address: 30 W. 47th Street, Suite 8006 (8th Floor), New York, NY 10036
buyers.hours: Mon–Fri 10:00 AM–6:00 PM; closed Sat–Sun; walk-ins welcome, appointments for large collections
buyers.payout_claims: "Live market pricing" and "competitive market-based prices"; no percent-of-spot figure posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Tested on DCA-certified calibrated scales right in front of you; electronic assay for purity
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage (buyersofnewyork.com): family-owned, 'over 30 years' / 'operating since the early 1990s'; buys gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, luxury watches, coins, estate and scrap gold. States items are 'tested on DCA-certified calibrated scales right in front of you' and mentions XRF analysis. Displays karat/volume rate tables driven by live market data (dollar values render client-side, blank in static fetch). Walk-ins welcome, no appointment needed for most items.

buyers.name: New York Gold Buyers
buyers.address: 30 W. 47th St., Suite 805G, New York, NY 10036
buyers.hours: Mon–Sat 10:00 AM–5:00 PM; walk-ins welcome, no appointment required
buyers.payout_claims: "Pays up to 99% of spot" — "99% Max Payout Rate Based on live spot price"
buyers.testing_transparency: Purity tested and weighed in front of you — every time
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage (newyorkgoldbuyers.com): claims 'up to 99% of spot' and '$0 Hidden Fees, Ever'; '30+ years of experience in the jewelry industry'. Buys gold, silver, diamonds, watches, coins, estate jewelry, scrap. 'No appointment required. Walk in, get tested, get paid.' References live gold spot price but posts no actual dollar rates. The 99% ceiling claim is a marketing maximum, not a posted schedule.

buyers.name: Manhattan Gold & Silver
buyers.payout_claims: Same-day payout promised: "you will receive a prompt payout on the same day"; no percent-of-spot figure
buyers.testing_transparency: Publishes its assay methods: acid testing, ultrasound assay, spectrometer assay, and fire assay
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage (mgsrefining.com): Diamond District precious-metal refinery, 40th-anniversary logo referenced, 40+ years recycling metals for jewelers, pawnbrokers, dentists, industrial clients. Displays live prices for gold, silver, platinum, palladium, rhodium. Describes acid testing, ultrasound assay, XRF testing, and fire assay. IMPORTANT: primarily trade/B2B — site indicates the public can generally only sell coins and bars (plus silver up to 200 oz); scrap from the public is not accepted. Drop-off in person or ship-your-lot options. Hours not published on page fetched.

buyers.name: Martin Busch Jewelers
buyers.hours: Tue–Fri 11:00 AM–6:30 PM; Sat 11:00 AM–5:00 PM; closed Sun–Mon; walk-ins accepted, appointments bookable
buyers.payout_claims: Immediate cash offer while you wait; +30% value if taken as store credit or trade
buyers.testing_transparency: Electronic testers, acid tests, or scratch tests; also weighs craftsmanship and antique value, not just melt
buyers.evidence_notes: Gold-buyers page (martinbuschjewelers.com/pages/gold-buyers-in-new-york-city): Financial District jeweler, self-described 'oldest continuously open jewelry store in the area'. States they use 'electronic testers, acid tests, or scratch tests' and consider craftsmanship/antique value. Offers 30% more value for store credit or trade vs cash. Links a live Kitco gold chart but posts no in-house buy rates. Mentions knowing values 'for insurance purposes' (appraisal context, not shipment insurance).

buyers.name: Diamond Source NYC
buyers.address: 20 West 47th Street, Suite 401, New York, NY 10036
buyers.hours: Mon–Fri 10:00 AM–6:00 PM ET; walk-ins welcome
buyers.payout_claims: "Up to 99% of current spot market value"; offers based on live COMEX spot pricing
buyers.testing_transparency: GIA-trained, certified appraisers evaluate with professional equipment; specific method not detailed
buyers.evidence_notes: Sell-gold page (diamondsourcenyc.com/sell-gold/): 'over 25 years' in business; buys 9K–24K gold jewelry, bars, bullion, coins, scrap, dental gold, diamonds, watches, platinum. Claims 'up to 99% of current spot market value' with 'live COMEX spot pricing'. Same-day cash. Insured shipping label offered for its mail-in option. Contact email is a gmail address, which reads less corporate but address/phone/hours all published on-site.

buyers.name: Global Gold & Silver, Inc.
buyers.address: 7 West 45th St #1200, New York, NY 10036 (also 8819 3rd Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11209)
buyers.testing_transparency: Describes ascertaining purity, weight, and value through careful hand-testing of your gold
buyers.evidence_notes: Sell-gold page (globalgoldandsilver.com/sell-gold): 'Since 2008'; Manhattan (45th St) and Bay Ridge Brooklyn storefronts with phones published. Buys gold jewelry, scrap, diamond jewelry, watches, coins, bullion. 'We ascertain purity, weight, and value—often through the careful, gentle process of hand-testing your gold.' Accepts walk-ins or appointments; also offers free FedEx mail-in kit and cites BBB 'A' accreditation and a 100% satisfaction guarantee. No payout percentages or rates posted; hours not published on the page fetched.

buyers.name: GEM Pawnbrokers
buyers.address: 21 W 47th St, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10036 (buy/pawn operation; other Manhattan branches at 351 W 125th St, 4229a Broadway, 608 8th Ave)
buyers.payout_claims: "Payment is immediate. Once your items are evaluated, you receive cash on the spot." No percent-of-spot figure
buyers.testing_transparency: Certified jewelers evaluate every piece; free, no-obligation appraisal before you decide
buyers.evidence_notes: We-buy-gold page + Manhattan locations page (gempawnbrokers.com): 'Founded... since 1947', '70+ years in business', licensed by NYC Dept. of Consumer Affairs. Buys gold jewelry, bullion, bars, coins, scrap, silver, platinum (explicitly does not buy palladium). 'Every appraisal is free, transparent, and comes with no obligation to sell.' Walk-in, no appointment required at any location. Hours vary per store and are listed only on individual location pages, so not captured here.

buyers.name: Albert and Sons Jewelry Buyers (47th St Buyers)
buyers.address: 37 West 47th St, Suite #203, New York, NY 10036
buyers.hours: Site states open 7 days a week 9:00 AM–9:00 PM (one section says 6 days) — confirm before visiting
buyers.payout_claims: States the house keeps "a few percentage points and the customer selling their diamond gets the majority of the price"
buyers.testing_transparency: Sits with you and examines each piece in person; specific test equipment not described on site
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage (47stbuyers.com): 'over 30 years' in the Diamond District; buys gold, diamonds, silver coins, luxury watches, designer/antique/estate jewelry. Site self-contradicts on hours ('actually opened 7 days a week from 9am – 9pm' vs '6 days a week' elsewhere), hence the verify flag. Walk-ins and appointments both offered ('call or email to set up an appointment'). No posted rates or fee policy.
